summary: ARS 1000 Consolide Dashboard Module - Complete Testing. All 21 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend UI elements verified working with proper navigation, PDF export, and QuickActionsPanel integration. Fixed PDC module card navigation path.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ars1000_consolide.py correctly aggregates 6 modules (membres, gouvernance, formation, pdc, tracabilite, audit)
Score global is correctly calculated as average of 6 module scores
Readiness labels correctly applied: >=80 'Pret pour l'audit', >=50 'En bonne voie', <50 'Actions requises'
Actions prioritaires correctly aggregated from all modules (max 8)
PDF export uses reportlab with proper styling, includes modules table and actions list
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for all key elements
Circular score gauge displays correctly with color coding
All 6 module cards are clickable and navigate to correct module dashboards
QuickActionsPanel has 'ARS 1000' section with Readiness link
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARS 1000 Consolide module fully tested. Current scores: Global 60%, Membres 71%, Gouvernance 81%, Formation 42%, PDC 100%, Tracabilite 63%, Audit 2%. 4 actions prioritaires displayed. PDF export works correctly. Fixed PDC module card navigation from /cooperative/pdc to /cooperative/pdc-v2.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/ars1000-consolide/dashboard: PASSED - Returns consolidated dashboard with score_global, readiness, 6 modules
backend_endpoints.GET /api/ars1000-consolide/export/pdf: PASSED - Generates PDF report with correct content-type and filename

dashboard_structure.readiness: PASSED - Returns 'En bonne voie' for score 60%
dashboard_structure.modules: PASSED - Returns all 6 modules with titre, clauses, score, indicateurs, actions
dashboard_structure.actions_prioritaires: PASSED - Returns aggregated actions from all modules

frontend_pages./cooperative/ars1000-readiness: PASSED - Displays circular score gauge, 6 module cards, actions prioritaires, PDF export button

frontend_interactions.Module card navigation: PASSED - All 6 module cards navigate to correct dashboards
frontend_interactions.Action item navigation: PASSED - Clicking action navigates to relevant module
frontend_interactions.Home navigation: PASSED - Home button navigates to cooperative dashboard
frontend_interactions.QuickActionsPanel Readiness link: PASSED - ARS 1000 section has Readiness link that navigates correctly

PDC_module_navigation.issue: PDC module card navigated to /cooperative/pdc which doesn't exist
